videos.title: SWITZERLAND TRAVEL DOCUMENTARY | A Winter Wonderland
videos.description:
Follow us on our winter adventure through Switzerland! 
Known for its never-ending sunshine and its magnificent mountain scenery - the Engadin is a high alpine valley in Switzerland’s southeastern canton of Graubünden. Staying at Giardino Mountain for 10 nights, we experienced numerous exciting winter sports activities that make a visit to the Engadin an unforgettable experience. 

Support us:
►► If you would like to support us with our production of travel documentaries, you can now 'buy us a refill of diesel' - https://www.buymeacoffee.com/lucastjahn

Thank you:
A big THANK YOU goes to the sponsors of this trip: Giardino Mountain (https://giardinohotels.ch/st-moritz/), St. Moritz Engadin and Pontresina Bergsteigerschule (https://bergsteiger-pontresina.ch/). We are also very grateful to Claudia Dressler and Sieglinde Sülzenfuhs from Global Communications Experts who came up with the idea of an Engadin Winter Documentary and were responsible for the organization of the trip. Another thank you goes to Maïté Werder from St. Moritz Engadin Tourism who helped us with the correct pronunciation of all Swiss names. We’d also like to thank all our guides and interview partners - Susi Wiprächtiger, Fabio Zanini, Christian Furger, Florian Schwarz, Gregor Stähli, Claudio Cesar & Gian Reto Clalüna. Last but not least, we would like to thank everyone who made our stay in Switzerland special including all our wonderful guides and the entire team of Giardino! 

Key Stats:
Duration of trip: 11 days
Distance driven: 700 km (in Switzerland) 
Time of year: January
Region: Canton of Graubünden, specifically the Upper and Lower Engadin
Base: Giardino Mountain, Champfèr, St. Moritz
Switchbacks driven: 79

Activities
Hotel: Giardino Mountain - https://giardinohotels.ch/st-moritz/
Canyoning: Pontresina Bergsteigerschule - https://bergsteiger-pontresina.ch/
Snowshoeing: The Outdoors St. Moritz - https://www.theoutdoors-stmoritz.com/
Cross Country Skiing: https://www.skischool.ch/ 
Bobsleigh: Olympia Bob Run St. Moritz - Celerina  - https://www.olympia-bobrun.ch/
Carriage Ride: Clalüna-Sils Kutschenfahrten - https://www.claluena-sils.ch/
Museum: Segantini Museum - https://segantini-museum.ch/
Restaurant Fex: https://www.hotelfex.ch/
Vehicle: WorldCruiser 2 by Tom's Fahrzeugtechnik - https://www.toms-fahrzeugtechnik.de/ 

Historic Images:
All historic images used in the travel documentary were licensed from Dokumentationsbibliothek St. Moritz (https://www.biblio-stmoritz.ch/dokumentationsbibliothek/) or provided by Olympia Bob Run St. Moritz - Celerina. 

Mask Rules:
If you see us not wearing an otherwise mandatory mask - such as at the Olympia Bob Run - during the video, rest assured that it was only taken off for that specific filming sequence. 

Full Disclosure:
This trip was fully sponsored by Giardino Mountain, St. Moritz Engadin and Pontresina Bergsteigerschule. We did not receive any additional payment for the production of our documentary, however. All opinions are our own. 

Say Hello: 
►► http://www.instagram.com/ruggedroadtrips
►► http://www.instagram.com/lucastjahn
►► http://www.ruggedroadtrips.com

videos.title: La diagonela 2025, Race Report Vlog
videos.description:
La Diagonela är ett lopp inom Ski Classics. Det går i Engadindalen, på hög höjd och är normalt 55 km långt. Detta år något förkortat pga snöbrist. 
Jag körde loppet och hade med mig en GoPro på benet och en på foten, den senare trillade dock av en bit in i loppet. Men här är i alla fall en film över hur jag upplevde loppet.

Innehåll:
00:00 Innan start
03:48 Start till 2a spurtpriset
10:13 2a spurtpriset till backarna vid 6km kvar
12:45 Backar vid 6km kvar
17:20 Målgång och eftersnack
